name: SixSeven
description: Replies with random annoyed English or Portuguese comebacks when someone makes a six seven joke.
author: itsneufox
install_msg: SixSeven loaded! Use `[p]sixseven toggle` to enable or disable replies.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild settings for whether responses are enabled, the cooldown, optional configured response text, and language overrides for channels and categories.
